# pheno-otel

> Canonical OpenTelemetry initialization for the Phenotype monorepo.
> One-liner `init()` with Drop-based TelemetryGuard.

## Files

- `Cargo.toml` — package manifest (v0.1.0)
- `README.md` — API surface, error type, build features
- `src/lib.rs` — library root (init, init_with_stdout, TelemetryGuard, OtelError)
- `src/init.rs` — init() / init_with_stdout() entry points
- `src/error.rs` — OtelError enum (ExporterInit, ResourceBuild, Shutdown)
- `src/guard.rs` — TelemetryGuard (Drop impl flushes + shuts down)
- `src/exporter/mod.rs` — exporter module root
- `src/exporter/stdout.rs` — stdout span exporter
- `tests/init_test.rs` — integration tests (INIT_LOCK mutex serializes global state)
- `AGENTS.md` — agent context
- `WORKLOG.md` — change history (v2.1 schema)
- `CHANGELOG.md` — release notes
- `LICENSE-MIT` — MIT license

## Conventions

- Conventional Commits
- rustfmt + clippy (`-D warnings`)
- 80% lib coverage gate
- Pinned to OpenTelemetry 0.27 line
- Tests serialize via INIT_LOCK mutex (no serial_test dep needed)
